title: Qlog Baseline Implementation Lane
summary: Coordinate the qlog v1 implementation baseline and keep the contained JSON core, QUIC vocabulary slices, and sequential follow-on aligned to the requirement corpus.
planned_changes: Stand up the `Incursa.Qlog` core types and `Incursa.Qlog.Serialization.Json` writer boundary, add the three `Incursa.Qlog.Quic` event-family slices, and leave sequential JSON Text Sequences as a follow-on lane so the first release stays bounded.
out_of_scope: HTTP/3 adapters in the first baseline.
Non-JSON sinks or transport layers that are not required by the draft source material.
Sequential JSON Text Sequences in the first implementation pass.
Large work-item backlogs, phase prompts, or chunk-manifest machinery.
Fake completeness or fabricated verification evidence.
verification_plan: Use slice-specific unit, contract, and snapshot tests for the core model and QUIC vocabulary families, keep the umbrella SpecTrace validation script in the loop, and leave the sequential follow-on as a placeholder until it is intentionally scheduled.
